themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "אָ֑רֶץ: on the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "'For so the LORD said unto me, I will take my rest, and I will consider in my dwelling place...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶשְׁקֳוטָ֖ה: unto me I will take my rest - to repose (usually figurative)".
